luttrell-morgan.text: Morgan Joe Luttrell (Republican) is the current officeholder running for U.S. Representative, TX-08.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Morgan Joe Luttrell had raised $333,122 and spent $636,769 for this campaign.

On 7-Jan-2025, Morgan Joe Luttrell voted Yea on H R 29. A Yea vote required federal detention of unauthorized immigrants charged with theft, burglary, larceny, or assaulting a law enforcement officer, and let state attorneys general sue the federal government over certain immigration enforcement decisions.

base.summary: This is the U.S. House race for TX-08. In the most recent election (2024-11-05), Morgan Luttrell (REP) won by about 36.43 points out of 342177 votes cast. The bullets below summarize each current candidate's public finance and voting-record data where available.
caveats: This summary only includes facts found in our sourced dataset (FEC finance filings and U.S. House Clerk roll-call votes). It omits anything we could not verify from those sources.
No public data in our set on any candidate's policy positions for this race (the positions field was empty for every candidate as of this build).
No public data in our set on Morgan Joe Luttrell's policy positions.
